name: default-db-tavern-list-response-pending-optimization
title: Default DB tavern list response pending optimization
description: Investigate and optimize /api/v1/taverns?limit=12 in the current default database environment; timing samples during envelope migration were around 12.46s-14.11s, exceeding the 1s SLA.
creator: lijin
notes: Optimized SQLAlchemy/default DB tavern list hydration by eager-loading characters/world info/LLM config and removing per-row get_token_usage() calls from list_taverns(). Added SQL statement-count regression.
